title: Add GitHub Actions CI (typecheck, test, lint, build)
description: Run 'bun run typecheck' + test + lint + build on every push and PR. High value now that the repo is public.
close_reason: Implemented: CI workflow (checks + surge auto-deploy) and Dependabot config

title: Handle RASP CDN failures gracefully
description: When the upstream RASP CDN host changes (it does often), the forecast overlay silently goes blank. Add an onerror handler on the overlay image to show a clear 'forecast unavailable — the CDN may have moved' message, and ideally try a fallback list of known CDN hosts. Pairs with the 'move CDN base URL to config' issue.
close_reason: Implemented graceful CDN failure handling + VITE_RASP_BASE_URL override

title: Add a LICENSE
description: The repo is public with no license. Pick and add one (e.g. MIT).
close_reason: Added MIT LICENSE + package.json license field

title: Fix mobile sizing / Safari 100vh layout
description: From todo.md (Layout): Mobile Safari 100vh behaviour hides page content behind the browser chrome. Work out a sizing fix so the app fits on mobile without the Chrome workaround.

title: Relocate header / time + loading indicator to save space
description: From todo.md: remove the header and place the time/loading indicator elsewhere to reclaim screen space — e.g. an animated fade-in/out label.

title: Add go-to location search (BGA turnpoints) and geolocation
description: From todo.md ('go-to UI with BGA turn point DB'): let users jump the map to a named BGA turnpoint and/or their current location.

title: Add more RASP forecast layers
description: From todo.md ('add layers'): surface additional RASP layers beyond the current six.

title: Add component tests (Vitest + Testing Library)
description: Only pure-logic tests (time, rasp) exist. Add component tests for layer switching, time scrubbing, and the menu using @testing-library/react (Vitest is already configured).
close_reason: Added @testing-library/react tests for Footer, Menu, and Header

title: Auto-deploy to production on merge to main
description: Deploy dist/ to rasp.surge.sh automatically on merge to main (do after the CI workflow lands). Consider migrating hosting off surge (Cloudflare Pages / Netlify / GitHub Pages) to also clear the dev-only surge/axios advisories.
close_reason: Implemented: CI workflow (checks + surge auto-deploy) and Dependabot config

title: Move RASP CDN base URL to configuration
description: RASP_BASE_URL is hardcoded in src/rasp.ts and the upstream CDN host changes frequently. Hoist it to a single config/env value so updating it is a one-liner, not a code dive.
close_reason: Implemented graceful CDN failure handling + VITE_RASP_BASE_URL override

title: Bump to TypeScript 6
description: TypeScript 6 is available (the audit noted it); evaluate and upgrade.
close_reason: Bumped TypeScript to 6.0.3; no code changes needed

title: Add keyboard navigation for time/layer controls
description: Arrow-key/keyboard control for scrubbing days/hours and switching layers (accessibility).

title: Re-add a proper PWA with offline overlay caching
description: The PWA/service worker was removed (the old one was broken on iPhone). Re-add a proper installable PWA via vite-plugin-pwa, with offline caching of recently viewed overlays.
close_reason: Re-added PWA (vite-plugin-pwa, NetworkFirst overlays, offline shell) + stale-forecast warning

title: Add a Playwright end-to-end smoke test
description: Codify the 'map + forecast overlay renders' check (prototyped during debugging) as a committed e2e test, ideally wired into CI.
close_reason: Added a deterministic Playwright e2e (overlay render + failure), gating deploy in CI

title: Add Dependabot or Renovate for dependency updates
close_reason: Implemented: CI workflow (checks + surge auto-deploy) and Dependabot config
